sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92759" key="r(ugxele/fas" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥυγχ-ελέφας</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">αντος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n92759.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with an elephant's trunk,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.204</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pall.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
